overview_of_the_company: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting.
core_value_proposition: Helping clients navigate their digital transformation journey
vision: To be a globally respected corporation that provides best-of-breed business solutions
mission: To achieve our objectives in an environment of fairness, honesty, and courtesy towards our clients, employees, vendors and society at large
unique_differentiators: AI-powered solutions Cloud-first approach Global delivery model
competitive_advantages: Strong technical expertise Global presence Innovative solutions
key_challenges_and_unmet_needs: Talent acquisition and retention Staying ahead of the competition Meeting evolving client needs
interesting_facts: Infosys is one of the largest IT companies in India
It has a global presence in over 50 countries
